VAL-POLISH-006.title: WCAG AA contrast in both themes

steps.action: Navigate to http://localhost:8000 in light mode
steps.expected: Page loads with light theme applied

steps.action: Read CSS variables via getComputedStyle in light mode
Calculate WCAG contrast ratios for light mode key pairs
steps.observed: text-muted(#767676) on form-bg(#ffffff): 4.54:1 ✓; link-color(#2672c1) on #ffffff: 4.93:1 ✓; field-value-number(#4d7a36) on #ffffff: 5.06:1 ✓; field-value-teal(#0f7d65) on #ffffff: 5.07:1 ✓; body-text(#333333) on #f5f5f5: 11.59:1 ✓; label(#555555) on #ffffff: 7.46:1 ✓; input(#333333) on #ffffff: 12.63:1 ✓; btn-text(#fff) on #0066cc: 5.57:1 ✓

steps.action: Click theme toggle twice to switch to dark mode
steps.observed: data-theme changed to dark; dark CSS variables active

steps.action: Read CSS variables via getComputedStyle in dark mode
Calculate WCAG contrast ratios for dark mode key pairs
steps.observed: text-muted(#a5a5a5) on form-bg(#242424): 6.30:1 ✓; link-color(#58a6ff) on #242424: 6.15:1 ✓; field-value-number(#b5cea8) on #242424: 9.14:1 ✓; field-value-teal(#4ec9b0) on #242424: 7.62:1 ✓; body-text(#e0e0e0) on #1a1a1a: 13.18:1 ✓; label(#c0c0c0) on #242424: 8.53:1 ✓; hint-text(#a5a5a5) on #242424: 6.30:1 ✓; btn-text(#fff) on #0066cc: 5.57:1 ✓

VAL-POLISH-006.notes: All key CSS variables (--text-muted, --link-color, --field-value-number, --field-value-teal) and core text/background pairs meet WCAG AA 4.5:1 minimum in both themes. In light mode, hint text (#767676) renders on white form backgrounds (4.54:1), not on the grey body (#f5f5f5 would be 4.17:1). Dark mode retains dark-optimized values (#b5cea8, #4ec9b0) for field-value colors which achieve high contrast ratios (9.14:1 and 7.62:1) against dark form backgrounds. Warning hint in both themes also passes on its contextual background.

summary: Tested 1 assertion: 1 passed. VAL-POLISH-006 WCAG AA contrast check passes in both light and dark themes. All key CSS variables and text/background pairs meet the 4.5:1 minimum contrast ratio requirement.
